## Analyzers (2)

### BackscatterIO_GetObservations `v1.0`
Determine whether a value has known scanning activity using Backscatter.io data.

- **Author:** brandon@backscatter.io
- **License:** APLv2
- **Data Types:** `ip`, `network`, `autonomous-system`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/BackscatterIO/BackscatterIO_GetObservations.json)

### BackscatterIO_Enrichment `v1.0`
Enrich values using Backscatter.io data.

- **Author:** brandon@backscatter.io
- **License:** APLv2
- **Data Types:** `ip`, `network`, `autonomous-system`, `port`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/BackscatterIO/BackscatterIO_Enrichment.json)
